headline: 暑期档热度攀升，《痴迷》登顶今日热搜
headlineEn: Summer Heat Rises, 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trends
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续领跑热搜榜；《权力的游戏前传：龙族》《鬼上车》等话题度高；《福尔摩斯小姐3》《末日地堡》等本周热门片单出炉。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' leads trending lists; 'House of the Dragon' and 'Ghost Ride' spark buzz; 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Silo' highlight this week's top titles.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周持续高热度
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' maintains strong buzz this week

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》新动态引粉丝期待
《玩具总动员5》列入本周趋势榜
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' enters this week's trending list

industryHighlights.text: 多部大片定档下半年，蜘蛛侠新作在列
industryHighlights.en: Multiple blockbusters set for second half, including new Spider-Man
